---
title: Cookie en 3D avec Blender
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784730529/cookie_m4yj1n.png
description: Cookie en 3D avec Blender, cours de Blender Guru
categories: ["3D"]
date: 2021-03-15 
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784730529/cookie_m4yj1n.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
